prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.3 kg; Height 171.2 cm; BMI 25.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 6.4%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 179mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 75.1kg; 9 months ago 76.9kg; 6 months ago 73.3kg; 3 months ago 68.8kg; current 75.3kg), Height (12 months ago 171.2cm; 9 months ago 171.2cm; 6 months ago 171.2cm; 3 months ago 171.2cm; current 171.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 51U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 59U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 31U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 374mg/g; 9 months ago 266mg/g; 6 months ago 337mg/g; 3 months ago 234mg/g; current 286mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 120mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 107mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
